heading: More than thirty years: permanent professors and the Director of Admissions of the United States Air Force Academy
label: 9320 More than thirty years: permanent professors and the Director of Admissions of the United States Air Force Academy
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)892010:1079a(c) (proviso).(proviso), .Aug. 7, 1947, ch. 512, § 520(c)61 Stat. 912The word “retire” is substituted for the words “direct the retirement of”. The words “as a commissioned officer” are substituted for the word “commissioned”.
Prior ProvisionsA prior section 9320 was renumbered .section 9420 of this title

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 8920 of this title1996— substituted “permanent professors and the Director of Admissions” for “professors” in section catchline and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The Secretary of the Air Force may retire any permanent professor of the United States Air Force Academy who has more than 30 years of service as a commissioned officer.”Pub. L. 104–106

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.label: a
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force may retire an officer specified in subsection (b) who has more than 30 years of service as a commissioned officer.
Any permanent professor of the United States Air Force Academy.
The Director of Admissions of the United States Air Force Academy.
